title: Mooshees
description: a mod that adds a new mob to the Mushroom Islands, the mooshes >:DD, they dont do anything.. just chill
body:
# MOOSHEES!!

## Mooshees is a mod that adds well mooshees! little critters that just chill!
 
### What does it add?
**- Red Mooshees**
**- Brown Mooshees**
**- Looshees**
**- Red Musheerooms**
**- Brown Musheerooms**

## What do they look Like?

### Red Mooshee
![Red Mooshee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9e2925707cb9b64b9bc622d0a49e5862ac7ba63.png)

### Brown Mooshee
![Brown Mooshee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c9342de68bafffb9789796aa6ca34b7bfc153d1.png)

### The Musheerooms
![The Musheeroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fb634d00a60810c1a4e9b42b74b2a9db6179e77.png)
